---
title: "Whitebeam (Sorbus aria)"
toc: true
---


<!-- This file is generated by scripts/generate_tree_list.py. Do not edit this file directly; update the generator or the underlying data sources instead. -->

**Family:** [Rosaceae](/trees/family/rosaceae.html)

**Genus:** [*Sorbus*](/trees/genus/sorbus.html)

| Tree | Planted |
| --- | --- |
| [Tree 152 — Whitebeam](../152.html) |  |
| [Tree 175 — Whitebeam](../175.html) |  |
